-(%0A%09%22bufio%22%0A%09%22fmt%22%0A%09%22os%22%0A)%0A%0Afunc ehPar(abertura, fechamento rune) bool %7B%0A%09if abertura == '(' && fechamento == ')' %7B%0A%09%09return true%0A%09%7D%0A%09if abertura == '%5B' && fechamento == '%5D' %7B%0A%09%09return true%0A%09%7D%0A%09return false%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09scanner := bufio.NewScanner(os.Stdin)%0A%0A%09if !scanner.Scan() %7B%0A%09%09return%0A%09%7D%0A%09texto := scanner.Text()%0A%0A%09var pilha %5B%5Drune%0A%0A%09for _, char := range texto %7B%0A%09%09if char == '(' %7C%7C char == '%5B' %7B%0A%09%09%09pilha = append(pilha, char)%0A%09%09%7D else if char == ')' %7C%7C char == '%5D' %7B%0A%09%09%09if len(pilha) == 0 %7B%0A%09%09%09%09fmt.Println(%22nao balanceado%22)%0A%09%09%09%09return%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%0A%09%09%09topo := pilha%5Blen(pilha)-1%5D%0A%0A%09%09%09if ehPar(topo, char) %7B%0A%09%09%09%09pilha = pilha%5B:len(pilha)-1%5D%0A%09%09%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09%09%09fmt.Println(%22nao balanceado%22)%0A%09%09%09%09return%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09if len(pilha) == 0 %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22balanceado%22)%0A%09%7D else %7B%0A%09%09fmt.Println(%22nao balanceado%22)%0A%09%7D%0A%7D
